Farewell, Leader of Fights"]]'''''}} =Appearances= ==Anime== ==={{hdr|Digimon Savers}}=== [[Yggdrasill (Savers)|Yggdrasill]] is the host computer of the Digital World. ==Manga== ==={{hdr|Digimon Next}}=== [[Yggdrasill (Next)|Yggdrasill]] is the host computer of the Digital World. {| |[[File:Barbamon Yggdrasil.png|thumb|[[Barbamon (Next)|Barbamon]] fused with Yggdrasill.]] |} ==={{hdr|Digimon Xros Wars (Manga)|Digimon Xros Wars}}=== As shown in a flashback in "''[[Digimon Xros Wars - Chapter 20|Xros Miracle!! Reel in a Sliver of Hope!]]''", after [[Bagramon (Xros Wars)|Bagramon]] had half his body burnt by [[Homeostasis]], he discovered [[Yggdrasill]], who he referred to as "the main server of the gods" and "the tree of information". He then cut part of it to replace the half of his body he lost and extend his life, which gave him great power and vast knowledge. Before this event, the AI that controlled Yggdrasill brought its logical thinking to an extreme and saw the [[Real World]] as a threat to be destroyed. It was then destroyed itself by [[Daimon Masaru]] and [[Agumon (Savers)|Shine Greymon]], and Homeostasis was created based on that incident as a calm, protective god. {| |[[File:Yggdrasill 7D6 XWmanga.png|thumb|Daimon Masaru and Shine Greymon confronting Yggdrasill_7D6]] |} ==Video Games== ==={{hdr|Digimon Collectors}}=== Yggdrasill_7D6 is the final boss of the game. It can only be obtained as a collectible card. ==={{hdr|Digimon Crusader}}=== ==={{hdr|Digimon World Re:Digitize Decode}}=== [[File:Yggdrasill decode.jpg|thumb|Yggdrasill_7D6 from ''Digimon World Re:Digitize Decode'']] After being sealed inside the [[Infinity Mountain]], Yggdrasill is reactivated in order to be the responsible of repairing the [[Digital World]] from the damage caused by the lifeform [[Vitium]]. The only solution Yggdrasill can reuse consists of activating the [[X-Program]]. Because of this program, the [[Royal Knights]] [[Dukemon X]] and [[Omegamon X]] appear in the Digital World, wondering what are Yggdrasill's reasons to reactivate the program and repeat such tragedy. Yggdrasill appears when the protagonist ([[Shinomiya Rina]] or [[Taiga]], player's choice) reaches the 12th floor of the Infinity Mountain. Yggdrasill then takes control of [[DORUmon (X-evolution)|DORUguremon]] and forces him to [[Evolution/Video_Games#Digimon_World_Re:Digitize_.26_Decode|evolve]] to [[Death-X-mon]]. Once Death-X-mon is defeated, it confronts directly the protagonist and their companions, arguing it has already made a backup of the Digital World. [[Kuga Yuuya]] helps actively in this battle. When Yggdrasill is defeated, the X-Program is stopped. Yggdrasill reappears at level 100 when the protagonist decides to go up to the 100th floor of the Infinity Mountain. To make Yggdrasill appear, the player must have overcome the 100 floors without being defeated once. It considers protecting the stability of the Digital World its main priority, and the protagonist, a bug to be erased as they disturb said stability. Since this second version of Yggdrasill is stronger than the previous one, the protagonist will be assisted by [[Alphamon]], who wants to settle up with it for having been transformed him into [[Death-X-mon]]. After the fight, Yggdrasill wonders if this was the future that was meant to have disappeared, before perishing, leaving behind five of its Wills. Taiga can only pick one of them, as the rest will disappear afterwards, and each of them can be traded to [[Agumon (X-Antibody)]] for an item that makes one of Digimaru's stats 9999 in combat. Based on what is hinted in the game, this Yggdrasill may be the same as the one of [[Digital Monster X-evolution]]. Yggdrasill can only be obtained as a collectible card. {| |[[File:Digimon World ReDigitize Decode - Yggdrasill Digimaru Black.png|thumb|Yggdrasill_7D6 facing against [[Digimaru]] and Black]] |[[File:Digimon World ReDigitize Decode - Yggdrasill Digimaru Alphamon.png|thumb|Yggdrasill_7D6 facing against Digimaru and Alphamon]] |[[File:Digimon World ReDigitize Decode - Yggdrasill Defeated.png|thumb|Yggdrasill_7D6, defeated]] |} ==={{hdr|Digimon Story: Cyber Sleuth}}=== ==={{hdr|Digimon World -next 0rder-}}=== ==={{hdr|Digimon World -next 0rder- International Edition}}=== ==={{hdr|Digimon Story: Cyber Sleuth Hacker's Memory}}=== ==Virtual Pets== ==={{hdr|DigiWindow}}=== [[Digimon Web]] released a promotional sprite for Yggdrasill_7D6 that was meant to be a downloadable character for Japanese cell phones, but it was never actually available. ==TCG== {{NeoTCG |d=Yggdrasill |s1=AE |s2=DCG }} =Image Gallery= {{IGTabs2 |1=bandai |t1= {{IG |bg=white |w=200 |h=200 |i1=Yggdrasill 7d6.jpg{{!}}200px |c1=[[Digimon Reference Book]] |i2=Yggdrasil2.png{{!}}200x200px |c2=[[Digital Monster Card Game Alpha]] |i3=Yggdrasill_re.jpg{{!}}200x200px |c3=[[Digimon World Re:Digitize Decode]] }} |2=toei |t2= {{IG |bg=white |w=200 |h=200 |i1=Yggdrasill7d6.jpg{{!}}200x200px |c1=[[Digimon Savers]] |i2=359_Yggdrasill_7d6.png{{!}}200px |c2=Digimon Savers Lineart Book |i3=360_Yggdrasill_7d6.png{{!}}200px |c3=Digimon Savers Lineart Book |i4=Sketch_Yggdrasil2.png{{!}}200px |c4=Digimon Savers Lineart Book }} |3=game |t3= {{IG |w=128 |h=128 |i1=Yggdrasill dot.png |c1=[[Digimon Story: Cyber Sleuth]]

As [[Hypnos]] and the [[Wild Bunch]] managed to reestablish a connection with it, as it remained in the Digital World, they reconstructed it out of [[Chrome Digizoid]], drastically improving its durability and also being equipped with Hypnos' deletion program, [[Yuggoth]]. In order for it to realize (through [[Quantum Teleportation|quantum teleportation]]) in the [[Real World]], the data was downloaded onto [[Lee Jianliang]]'s digivice through a USB-like port and Shibumi initiated a Card Slash using the blue card, allowing it to realize successfully in [[Real_World#Shinjuku_.28.E6.96.B0.E5.AE.BF.E5.8C.BA.29|Shinjuku]]. {| |[[Image:Dukemon ride on Grani.jpg|thumb|Grani carrying [[Dukemon]] in ''Digimon Tamers''.]] |[[Image:Grani3.jpg|thumb|Grani on computer.]] |} ==={{hdr|Digimon Xros Wars: The Young Hunters Who Leapt Through Time}}=== Grani appears during the battle of the original team leaders versus the [[Vamdemon]] army. He fuses with [[Matsuda Takato]] and [[Guilmon (Tamers)|Dukemon]] immediately, becoming [[Dukemon: Crimson Mode]]. After the battle is over, he leaves{{rfe|XW|78|''The Gathering of the Legendary Heroes!
